hypothesis: Training 3D molecular generative models with a chemically accurate, aromaticity-aware valency constraint derived from Kekulized GEOM-Drugs data, in conjunction with a GFN2-xTB energy-guided loss, will produce generated conformers whose bond lengths, angles, and torsions more closely approximate GFN2-xTB minima and yield improved downstream property prediction accuracy compared to models trained under conventional evaluation frameworks.
